Flipdish Open API v1.0 — Orders operations. Flipdish is an online ordering and branded-app platform for restaurants and takeaways. This specification was derived from the official Flipdish Swagger document and grouped by resource domain.

 Name: Flipdish Support
 Email: help@flipdish.com
